arts.ttl: Arsenal supporters less angry than Tottenham, Man City in Premier League study
arts.sum: All of this data has led to SeatPick handing out 'anger scores' to the fanbases of all 20 Premier League clubs. Arsenal supporters have been listed as one of the least angry fanbases in the Premier League, according to a recent study.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland and Pep Guardiola disagree over dream Arsenal signing
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola and Erling Haaland have different opinions when it comes to which Arsenal star every other team in the division would want. Many fans and pundits have shared their combined starting XIs for the two teams - but City boss Guardiola has admitted that he'd have signed Rice if he wanted to come to the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta’s net worth, Miss Spain wife and new Arsenal salary after contract extension
arts.sum: Since then, Arteta has established himself as a respected figure in north London, leading Arsenal to second-place finishes in the Premier League in the last two seasons, as well as lifting the FA Cup in his first season and securing Community Shields in 2020 and 2023. He joined Pep Guardiola's coaching staff at Manchester City in 2016, where he helped the team secure two Premier League titles, two EFL Cups, two community shields and an FA Cup before leaving the club in 2019 to take up the managerial reins at Arsenal.
